channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I’ve covered tech sales for 8 years — these 25 Prime Day smart home deals are at record-low prices, and worth your cash
item.description: I've covered tech sales for 8 years, and I'm rounding up the best Prime Day smart home deals that are all on sale for record-low prices and are worth your money.

item.title: How to watch Tunisia vs Netherlands: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Oranje aim to clinch top spot
item.description: Here's how to watch Tunisia vs Netherlands for free online and from anywhere as the Dutch eye another big win at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: The HomePod mini was my favorite cheap wireless speaker — but Apple’s price hike has now handed that honor to the Sonos Era 100 SL
item.description: More connectivity, better sound, better futureproofing — I was the HomePod mini's biggest advocate, but not any more.

item.title: The best upgrade you can give your home is new, better Wi-Fi – and Amazon has knocked $100 off its eero mesh system
item.description: Can't get Wi-Fi in parts of your home? This great mesh Wi-Fi system deal from Amazon could solve that...

item.title: GTA 6 en précommande : l’étrange surprise de la version boîte sans aucun disque
item.description: La sortie de GTA 6 est calée pour le 19 novembre 2026. Si vous envisagez de le réserver, sachez que Rockstar a pris une décision radicale qui va bousculer le marché des consoles de jeux.

item.title: As a fitness tracker reviewer, sometimes I'm sick of wearing smartwatches — here are 3 discreet, screenless fitness trackers I've personally tested, and where to buy them on Prime Day
item.description: While I love smartwatches, sometimes it's better to embrace disconnection — so here are some 'focus' wearables I've tested and liked

item.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
item.description: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

item.title: Score a discounted Xbox console before the prices jump
item.description: Microsoft announced today that the price of all Xbox models will rise in August, the second time in less than a year as memory prices continue to wreak havoc on every industry from cars to computing. Thankfully, we’re already out looking for Prime Day deals, and we were able to find some discounts on both […]

item.title: Instagram wants to monopolize your attention
item.description: This week, Instagram launched a series of new features for its smart TV app that are all designed to get people to spend more time on the platform through the biggest screens in their homes. In addition to vertical Reels, Instagram for TV - which is currently available for Amazon Fire TV, Google TV, and […]

item.title: Hausse des prix Apple : où trouver encore un MacBook ou un iPad au tarif d’avant
item.description: Apple a relevé les tarifs de presque tout son matériel, de 100 à 700 € selon les produits. Avant de payer le nouveau prix, un réflexe simple peut faire économiser plusieurs centaines d'euros : regarder ce qu'il reste en stock chez les revendeurs.

item.title: How to watch Japan vs Sweden: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for crucial Group F clash at FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Japan vs Sweden for free online and from anywhere in an effective Group F playoff at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Hausses de prix des Mac et iPad : Apple n’avait « jamais vu » une telle flambée
item.description: Apple augmente d'un coup les prix de ses Mac et iPad partout dans le monde. La marque pointe du doigt la pénurie de mémoire, gonflée par la course à l'IA.

item.title: RAMageddon just got extremely real
item.description: As far as prices go, Apple is kind of a reverse canary in the coal mine. With its famously generous margins and immense purchasing volume, it can afford to ride out price fluctuations in its supply chain in a way no other consumer tech company can. So when Apple raises prices across nearly all of […]

item.title: Forget Peloton. Race to This 25% Off Deal on Hydrow’s Rowing Machine (2026)
item.description: This Peloton-adjacent rowing machine gamifies your workout to a satisfying effect, and it’s up to 25 percent off right now for Prime Day.

item.title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
item.description: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third-party breach.

item.title: Prime Day deals on small TVs: The Hisense DécoTV that changed the vibe of my bedroom is under $200
item.description: I vetted the best Prime Day TV deals to find 32, 43, and 50-inch TVs on sale. Save up to 50% on TVs for small spaces, including QLEDs.

item.title: New data reveals the surprising places Americans are booking for July 4
item.description: Americans are searching for cheaper flights, all-inclusive resorts, and lower-cost alternatives to popular vacation hotspots this Fourth of July. Many Americans have one thing on their minds when it comes to Fourth of July travel this year: What’s the best bang for the buck?

item.title: Notion Mail is shutting down
item.description: So long, Notion Mail.

item.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
item.description: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

item.title: I hate AI and its impact on RAM, but I love OLEDs and how affordable they are now — and this Alienware ultrawide is the best example on Prime Day
item.description: OLED gaming monitors are more affordable than ever, and it's very satisfying to see amid PC hardware prices constantly increasing.

item.title: Spain will require carriers to keep mobile networks live during power outages
item.description: Spain's mobile networks will need to stay live for at least four hours during power outages, per new rules.

item.title: AI just helped researchers read a 2,000-year-old Mount Vesuvius scroll that’s too charred to ever be opened — as X-ray images reveal ancient stoic philosophy
item.description: Researchers are getting new insights into life and literature from the first century, via previously inaccessible text.

item.title: The 55+ best Prime Day tech deals, chosen by a tech editor on a tight budget
item.description: Mashable's tech editor found the best Prime Day tech deals of 2026. Get AirPods for $99, Kindles for $85, and save 50% on Bose headphones.

item.title: The Dell 16 Plus is the 'most affordable' ultra-thin laptop we've tested — with a big price drop for students and executives
item.description: In our tests, this one delivered great performance and long-lasting battery life.

item.title: Prime Day ends soon: We found the 120+ best deals on Apple, Sony, DJI, and Lego favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale is still going. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Steam Summer Sale 2026 arrives: 10 deals to know
item.description: Steam's big summer sale is here, and you can save as much as 80 percent on some of the best games of the last decade.

item.title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
item.description: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

item.title: We're Live-Blogging For The Real Heads Still Shopping Amazon Prime Day
item.description: The third day of Amazon Prime Day is for the real heads, and so is our live blog. We'll bring you deals, trends, and commentary until Amazon's annual summer sale finally hangs up its cleats.

item.title: Want to finally add Catan to your board game collection? These are the versions and expansions I recommend
item.description: Get Catan this Prime Day, and its expansions, before the deals disappear!

item.title: This air cooler could be just what you need to bring the heat down in your home this summer — but there's one small caveat you should be aware of before investing
item.description: Air coolers are being ransacked during Prime Day, but we've spotted this air cooler for less than £100.

item.title: Polestar won't be able to sell its cars in the US next year
item.description: Polestar moved some of its production to the US, but it may be locked out from selling its cars here soon.

item.title: A solution to RAM-aggedon? AMD buys startup to transform SSDs into cheap 'virtual RAM' to cut price, its third attempt at solving memory conundrum after RAMdisk and StoreMI
item.description: AMD's latest AI-centric acquisition could be a game-changer for its data center ambitions

item.title: Apple's price hike choice almost guarantees more expensive iPhones as the RAM crisis is far from over: 'We are not at the bottom and will take more time to climb out,' expert says
item.description: The RAM crisis forced Apple's hand, and the price hikes we just experienced will likely be repeated when all the new iPhones arrive in September.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump administration to block asylum seekers at the U.S.-Mexico border
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security did not say if it plans to revive the policy, but applauded the ruling. The Supreme Court cleared the way Thursday for the Trump administration to potentially revive an immigration policy once used to turn back migrants seeking asylum at the U.S.-Mexico border.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the latest Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on Samsung TVs, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: Ce que le télescope James-Webb révèle du chaos cosmique dans la célèbre galaxie du cigare
item.description: À 12,5 millions d’années-lumière, une galaxie tourmentée allume des étoiles à un rythme fou. M82 fascine d’autant plus que son cœur est longtemps resté caché derrière d’épaisses poussières. Aujourd’hui, le télescope James-Webb soulève enfin le voile… et révèle un spectacle aussi vertigineux...

item.title: I vetted the 9 best projector deals at Amazon Prime Day — get record-low discounts on Hisense, XGIMI, and Anker
item.description: Projectors from Hisense, TCL, Anker Nebula, BenQ, XGIMI, and more are on sale for Prime Day with discounts up to 32% off.

item.title: Almost half of ransomware victims have data stolen before they can even detect an intrusion
item.description: Hackers are getting better at hiding and stealing files without raising alarms.
